llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The board president asked 'Do we have any changes to the agenda?' and received no response before proceeding to 'Approval of the Agenda.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move we approve the consent agenda. And a second second. All in favor? Aye.
